text.message: this aint the ddonut my friend
its more like a bagel tbh
i thought u were a donut worshipper
do u guys know what quant trading is
i thought we were just meming on donuts
its a prestigious career field for game enthusiasts
u get paid a lot of money for doing it
they basically pay u a lot for playing the game of trading
so its proprietary high frequency trading
the salary is crazy out of undergrad
what kind of quals do you need for it?
traded it for a cool new smart fridge tho
do u wanna take a guess at the first year compensation for a trader at a top firm?
the best quant trading firm is jane street
do you wanna take a guess at their first year package
700k for first year right out of undergrad
u gotta be good at math tho
i go to a lower tier firm called SIG, or susquehanna and they are paying me 525k for my first year
60 hours a week for newbies typically
because u have to learn a lot and its really high pressure
can anyone give me a better deal
this is exatcly what i need
ill do it my god damn self
blue wins with city this turn
